senses.definition: the part of a house where people spend time together talking, watching television, relaxing, etc.

examples.x: She gathered with her family in the living room to play board games.
She sat at the dining table in the living room and enjoyed a meal.
The living room had a comfortable sofa where she took afternoon naps.
A vibrant rug added a pop of color to the living room, complementing the tasteful decor.
In the living room, family and friends gathered for laughter and shared stories during the holidays.

senses.definition: a room we use for sleeping

examples.x: He kept his favorite toys on the shelves in his bedroom.
In our house, the bigger bedroom was always reserved for my older sister.
My siblings and I share a single bedroom in our house.
She decorated the walls of her bedroom with pictures and posters.
She placed a small nightstand next to the bed in the bedroom for her belongings.

senses.definition: the place in a building or home where we make food

examples.x: My mother believes that no one should leave the kitchen after a meal until they have completely cleaned it.
She cooked a delicious meal in the kitchen.
She stored canned goods and snacks in the kitchen pantry.
The kitchen had a double oven, allowing for simultaneous baking of different dishes.
The mother asked her children to leave the kitchen until she finished preparing dinner.

senses.definition: a room that has a toilet and a sink, and often times a bathtub or a shower as well

examples.x: He took a refreshing shower in the bathroom after a long day.
She brushed her teeth in the bathroom sink before going to bed.
He cleans the bathroom regularly to keep it hygienic and tidy.
They organized shampoo and soap bottles in the shower caddy in the bathroom.
She used a hairdryer in the bathroom to dry her hai.

senses.definition: a room that we use to eat meals in

examples.x: She cleans the dining room after each meal.
She set the table with plates and glasses in the dining room.
They enjoyed breakfast in the dining room, starting the day with a tasty meal.
They enjoyed lively conversations over dinner in the cozy dining room.
They gathered in the dining room for Sunday brunch.

senses.definition: a room in a private house that a person uses for work, which often contains a computer, working desk, printer, etc.
a space in a house dedicated to entertainment and relaxation, equipped with audiovisual equipment such as a large screen, surround sound, and comfortable seating
a dedicated room in a house equipped for watching movies or TV shows with high-quality audio and video systems

examples.x: The family spent the evening in their home theater room, watching the latest blockbuster with surround sound.
We installed a projector and blackout curtains to turn our basement into a cozy home theater room.
The home theater room is the perfect spot to unwind after a long day, complete with comfy recliners and a big screen.
They recently upgraded their home theater room with a new sound system and a larger TV.
The kids love having movie nights in the home theater room, with popcorn and plenty of space for everyone.

senses.definition: a dedicated space for washing, drying, folding, and ironing clothes and linens, typically equipped with a washer, dryer, ironing board, and storage cabinets
a bedroom in a house for guests to stay or sleep in

examples.x: The guest room in the house was furnished with a queen-sized bed, bedside tables, and a cozy armchair, ensuring a welcoming stay for visitors.
Friends and relatives stayed in the guest room during their visit, enjoying the privacy and comfort of their own space within the home.
The guest room had a private bathroom attached, providing added convenience and comfort for guests during their stay.
Business travelers appreciated the work desk and ergonomic chair in the guest room, allowing them to stay productive during their stay.
The guest room had a cozy reading nook by the window, where visitors could relax with a book and enjoy natural light.

senses.definition: a room in an apartment or house for children to play in
a small room or area for putting in wet or dirty footwear and clothes before entering a house

examples.x: After a long hike, we left our muddy boots in the mudroom to avoid tracking dirt into the house.
The mudroom is the first place I go when I come home, where I take off my wet jacket and shoes.
The children always leave their school bags in the mudroom as soon as they come inside.
I keep a basket in the mudroom for laundry that needs to be washed.
Before entering the house, we always stop in the mudroom to shake off the snow from our boots.

senses.definition: a room in a private residence that is used for keeping books
a space in a residence designed for fitness and exercise activities, equipped with various fitness equipment and accessories
an enclosed space in a building, often featuring large windows or glass walls, designed to let in sunlight and provide a space for relaxation or indoor gardening

examples.x: The family spends most of their evenings in the sunroom, enjoying the warmth and natural light.
I love sitting in the sunroom with a cup of coffee, watching the rain fall outside.
They added a sunroom to the house so they could enjoy the garden all year long.
The sunroom is the best place to read a book or take a nap in the afternoon.
We’ve transformed the sunroom into a cozy space for morning yoga and meditation.

senses.definition: an area or room directly under the roof of a house, typically used for storage or as an additional living area

examples.x: She converted the attic into a cozy home office with skylights and built-in shelves.
The attic is accessible via a pull-down ladder in the hallway for storing seasonal decorations and old furniture.
They discovered old family heirlooms stored in boxes in the attic while cleaning out the house.
In older homes, attics were originally used as sleeping quarters before modern heating and cooling systems were introduced.

senses.definition: an area or room in a house or building that is partially or completely below the ground level

examples.x: They converted the basement into a home theater with comfortable seating and a big screen.
The basement often floods during heavy rain, so they installed a sump pump.
He keeps his workout equipment in the basement to have a private gym space.
The basement was dark and cool, perfect for storing old furniture and boxes.
She rents out the basement as a studio apartment to earn extra income.

senses.definition: a room in an apartment or house in which the family gathers to watch TV, relax, etc.

examples.x: The family room was furnished with a large sectional sofa, plush armchairs, and a coffee table, creating a cozy environment for movie nights.
Children sprawled out on the floor of the family room, playing board games and building forts with blankets and pillows.
Parents sipped coffee in the morning sunlight streaming through the windows of the family room, catching up on the day's news.
The family room doubled as a home office, with a desk and computer workstation tucked into one corner for remote work and study sessions.
Grandparents reminisced about old times in the family room, flipping through photo albums and sharing stories with the younger generation.

senses.definition: a small bathroom that usually contains only a toilet and a sink, intended for use by guests

examples.x: The powder room near the living room is perfect for guests to use when they visit.
She added a beautiful mirror and elegant lighting to the powder room to make it feel more inviting.
The house has a small powder room for guests, located just off the hallway.
After finishing the renovations, the powder room looked fresh and modern with new fixtures.
He quickly freshened up in the powder room before heading back to the party.

senses.definition: the largest and most private bedroom in a home, typically for the homeowners

examples.x: The master bedroom in their new home has a large walk-in closet and a spacious en-suite bathroom.
After a long day, they love retreating to the comfort of their master bedroom.
They decided to renovate their master bedroom to create a more relaxing atmosphere.
Their master bedroom is the perfect place to unwind, with its cozy bed and soft lighting.

senses.definition: a small room situated beside the bedroom of a large house, where people get dressed and store their clothes
a room in an apartment or house that a baby sleeps in

examples.x: They decorated the nursery with soft pastel colors and stuffed animals.
The nursery is located next to the parents' bedroom for easy access during the night.
She spent months preparing the nursery before the baby arrived.
The nursery has a crib, changing table, and a rocking chair for feeding.
They hired a designer to create a calming and beautiful nursery for their newborn.

senses.definition: a designated space in a house or building that is used for playing games, such as video games, board games, or billiards

examples.x: The kids spent hours in the game room playing video games and enjoying their favorite board games.
We decided to convert the basement into a game room for family fun and entertainment.
The game room was filled with a pool table, a dartboard, and a cozy couch for relaxing.
After school, the teenagers always hang out in the game room to play video games together.
They added bright lights and colorful decorations to the game room, making it feel lively and exciting.

senses.definition: a room where one can relax in a private house

examples.x: The family spent their evenings in the parlor, reading books and having conversations.
The old house still had a parlor, where visitors could sit and enjoy the warmth of the fireplace.
She carefully arranged the flowers in the vase in the parlor before the guests arrived.
The children were not allowed to play in the parlor; it was a space reserved for guests.
After dinner, they moved to the parlor to enjoy tea and talk about the day's events.

senses.definition: a small, cozy room in a house, typically used as a private study, home office, or a space for relaxation and entertainment
a large and open living space that combines multiple functions like a living room, dining room, and sometimes a kitchen, into one area

examples.x: The family spends most of their time in the great room, where they can relax and eat together.
The great room features large windows that let in plenty of natural light.
The open layout of the great room makes it perfect for entertaining guests.
They decided to combine the living room and dining room into one large great room.
We had a fireplace installed in the great room to make it even cozier during the winter.

senses.definition: a type of shared sleeping quarters that typically has multiple bunk beds arranged in the same room

examples.x: The cabin had a cozy bunk room where all the kids slept during our weekend getaway.
They converted the attic into a bunk room to provide more sleeping space for their guests.
The bunk room was perfect for the summer camp, with enough beds for all the campers.
After the renovation, the house had a spacious bunk room with four sets of bunks for the children.
We added a bunk room to our beach house to accommodate our large family during holidays.

senses.definition: a private relaxation area in a home, equipped with features like hot tubs, saunas, steam rooms, or massage areas

examples.x: After a long day at work, she enjoys unwinding in her home spa with a warm bath and soft music.
They transformed the basement into a home spa with a sauna and massage table for relaxation.
The home spa features a jacuzzi, perfect for soaking away the stress of the week.
He added a steam room and heated floors to his home spa to create the ultimate relaxation retreat.
She spends Sunday mornings in her home spa, practicing mindfulness while using the aromatherapy diffuser.

senses.definition: a small room that is often heated with steam and has wooden walls, where people sit for relaxation or health benefits

examples.x: After a long day of skiing, they relaxed their muscles in the hotel's traditional Finnish sauna.
The spa's luxurious sauna was equipped with heated cedar benches and aromatic steam.
The health club's sauna provided a tranquil retreat for members to unwind and detoxify.
The wellness center offered a variety of treatments, including hot stone massages and infrared sauna sessions.
She enjoyed the calming sensation of sweating out toxins in the dry heat of the sauna.

senses.definition: a designated space within a home or building designed for leisure activities such as playing games, watching movies, or socializing with friends and family

examples.x: The family spent every weekend in the recreation room, playing board games and watching movies together.
The recreation room is equipped with everything from a foosball table to a home theater system.
We added a pool table and a dartboard to the recreation room for extra fun during gatherings.
They often host game nights in the recreation room, where everyone plays cards or video games.
He decided to turn the basement into a recreation room to give his family more space for activities.

senses.definition: a room, particularly found in a large house, used for entertaining guests or relaxing
a room at the front of a house where family members usually gather to talk to each other, relax, watch television, etc.

examples.x: The front room was beautifully decorated with elegant furniture and bright, welcoming colors.
We gathered in the front room to greet our guests before heading to the dining area.
After a long day, I like to relax in the front room with a good book.
The front room had large windows that let in plenty of natural light.
We spent the afternoon in the front room, enjoying the view of the garden.

senses.definition: a living space, usually as a smaller part of a house, in which an elderly family member lives

examples.x: The family built a mother-in-law apartment in their backyard to give their elderly parents a comfortable and private living space.
After her retirement, Sarah moved into the mother-in-law apartment attached to her daughter's house.
The home was designed with a separate mother-in-law apartment, making it easy for extended family to visit and stay.
They rented out their mother-in-law apartment to a tenant, providing extra income while maintaining privacy.
The couple decided to build a mother-in-law apartment for their parents, so they could be closer as they aged.

senses.definition: a room immediately under the roof of a house, which is used as a storage or living space

examples.x: They converted the loft into a cozy bedroom.
The loft was full of old furniture and boxes.
He stored his books and winter clothes in the loft.
The loft had a skylight that let in plenty of natural light.
The artist turned the loft into a studio for painting.

senses.definition: a room or area in a house where a man can spend time doing his favorite hobbies and activities alone

examples.x: After a long week at work, he retreats to his man cave to relax and watch the game.
His friends love hanging out in his man cave, playing video games and having drinks.
He spent the weekend setting up his man cave with a new sound system and bar.
She surprised him with a vintage car poster for his man cave.
Every Friday night, the guys gather in his man cave to watch movies and play board games.

senses.definition: a safe room in an office or house where people can escape into in case of danger

examples.x: During the storm, they took shelter in the panic room, knowing it was the safest place in the house.
They felt more secure knowing they had a panic room with direct communication to the police.
The house was equipped with a panic room that could be locked from the inside for added security.
When the alarm went off, they quickly ran to the panic room, as it was the safest option.
The panic room was stocked with enough supplies to last for several days in case of an emergency.

senses.definition: a room in which there are large pieces of household equipment such as a dishwasher

examples.x: The utility room is where I keep all my cleaning supplies and the vacuum cleaner.
After the laundry was done, I folded the clothes in the utility room.
I always leave my muddy shoes in the utility room to avoid tracking dirt into the house.
We store extra towels and detergents in the utility room for convenience.
He fixed the broken lawnmower in the utility room because it has enough space for repairs.
